svg.content:
<mxfile host="65bd71144e"> <diagram name="biped_rl_policy_node Internal Architecture" id="biped-rl-policy-internal"> <mxGraphModel dx="1000" dy="800" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1000" pageHeight="800" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0"/> <mxCell id="1" parent="0"/>
<!-- Title --> <mxCell id="title" value="biped_rl_policy_node Internal Architecture" style="text;html=1;fontSize=16;fontStyle=1;align=center;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="200" y="20" width="500" height="30" as="geometry"/> </mxCell>
<!-- Inputs (purple) --> <mxCell id="cmd_vel" value="/cmd_vel (geometry_msgs/Twist)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="30" y="120" width="240" height="60" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <mxCell id="joint_states_in" value="/joint_states (sensor_msgs/JointState)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="30" y="240" width="240" height="60" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <mxCell id="imu_data" value="/imu/data (sensor_msgs/Imu)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="30" y="360" width="240" height="60" as="geometry"/> </mxCell>
<!-- Processing Pipeline (blue) --> <mxCell id="obs_builder" value="Observation Builder" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="340" y="200" width="240" height="60" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mlp" value="PyTorch MLP (512-256-128)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="340" y="330" width="240" height="60" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <mxCell id="converter" value="Action → Position Converter" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="340" y="460" width="240" height="60" as="geometry"/> </mxCell>
<!-- Internal State (yellow) --> <mxCell id="gait_clock" value="Gait Phase Clock (50Hz)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="660" y="100" width="220" height="50" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <mxCell id="prev_action" value="Previous Action Buffer" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="660" y="170" width="220" height="50" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mock_values" value="Mock Values (viz mode)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;dashed=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="660" y="240" width="220" height="50" as="geometry"/> </mxCell>
<!-- Outputs (green) --> <mxCell id="joint_states_out" value="/joint_states" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="660" y="430" width="220" height="60" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <mxCell id="fwd_pos" value="/fwd_pos_ctrl/commands" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="660" y="510" width="220" height="60" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <mxCell id="policy_state" value="/rl_policy_state" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="660" y="590" width="220" height="60" as="geometry"/> </mxCell>
<!-- Arrows: inputs to observation builder --> <mxCell id="e1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" parent="1" source="cmd_vel" target="obs_builder" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" parent="1" source="joint_states_in" target="obs_builder" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" parent="1" source="imu_data" target="obs_builder" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/> </mxCell>
<!-- Arrows: pipeline flow --> <mxCell id="e4" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" parent="1" source="obs_builder" target="mlp" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e5" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" parent="1" source="mlp" target="converter" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/> </mxCell>
<!-- Arrows: converter to outputs --> <mxCell id="e6" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" parent="1" source="converter" target="joint_states_out" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e7" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" parent="1" source="converter" target="fwd_pos" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e8" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" parent="1" source="converter" target="policy_state" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/> </mxCell>
<!-- Dashed arrows: internal state to observation builder --> <mxCell id="e9" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;dashed=1;" parent="1" source="gait_clock" target="obs_builder" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e10" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;dashed=1;" parent="1" source="prev_action" target="obs_builder" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e11" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;dashed=1;" parent="1" source="mock_values" target="obs_builder" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
